header.title: Finish your account setup
header.subtitle: Complete the missing required information to unlock the full system.

personal.title: Personal information
personal.subtitle: Complete only the required missing fields from your profile.

organization.title: Organization information
organization.subtitle: Complete the required organization locale and address details.

ledger.title: Initialize ledger accounts
ledger.subtitle: Choose the fastest way to create your first ledger structure.
ledger.manualPlaceholder: Paste one ledger account per line...

validations.personalAddress: Fill at least one personal address line.
validations.orgAddress: Fill at least one organization address line.

errors.personalInvalid: Fill all required personal fields before continuing.
errors.organizationInvalid: Fill all required organization fields before continuing.
errors.ledgerFile: Select a CSV or XLSX file first.
errors.ledgerMode: Choose a ledger import mode first.

done.title: Onboarding completed
done.subtitle: Your account is ready. You can continue to the system.
